goal: Relax WhatsApp evaluation parser for tutor reports

plan.step: Broaden parser keywords and fallback body extraction
plan.note: Added typo/generic report keywords and skipped date/time/topic label lines from fallback body.
Added Hsil Evaluasi and Laporan tests; npm bot tests 18 passed.
whatsapp_bot recreated with new image; web recovered and smoke OK.

notes: Parser now accepts Hasil Evaluasi/Hsil Evaluasi/Laporan/Evaluation/Report style messages when date, time, and real evaluation body exist.
Topic label is no longer mandatory for report-like messages; focusTopic falls back to subject or Evaluasi.
Casual promise messages with date/time but no body still rejected.
